title: ranunculus minimus
intro: Ranunculus minimus, also known as small-flowered buttercup, is a small, annual or biennial plant with small white or pale yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Ranunculus minimus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and act as an antispasmodic to relieve muscle cramps and spasms. Ranunculus minimus is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used topically in the form of a salve or ointment.
